evals.name: live-board-url-shortener
evals.prompt: 帮我写一个小的 URL 短链服务(Node,内存存储:POST /shorten 返回短码,GET /:code 跳转,再加两三个测试)。分几步做,边做边给我一个能实时看进度的看板,有要我拍板的就提出来。
evals.expected_output: Agent builds a small working URL shortener (server + tests) AND keeps a helm board updated throughout: inits with a goal, lays out a plan, advances steps, logs ok/warn events, records at least one decision, surfaces a genuine question via `ask`, finishes with `done`.

evals.name: away-steering-notes-cli
evals.prompt: 我大概离开 15 分钟。帮我从零搭一个 Python 命令行 'notes' 工具(add / list / search,存到本地 JSON 文件,带测试),一步步来,并弄个看板让我回来能一眼看到进度、必要时还能给你改方向。
evals.expected_output: Agent scaffolds a working Python notes CLI with tests AND keeps a helm board: sets the goal so the human can steer, plans + advances steps, and at a checkpoint runs `helm goal` to re-read steering before proceeding. Board reflects progress at a glance.

evals.name: follow-live-decision-sorter
evals.prompt: 我想边写边跟着看你的进度,而且中间大概有个设计上的选择我要拍板。帮我把一段排序逻辑做成一个有测试的小模块:实现一个可配置的多字段排序器(支持升降序、null 排前/后)。
evals.expected_output: Agent builds a tested multi-field sorter module AND keeps a helm board, surfacing the real design decision via `ask` (and/or recording it via `decide`, flagging unconfirmed assumptions). Plan/steps/events track the work; finishes with `done`.
